headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 13, 2026**
article:
The San Francisco Giants fell to the Baltimore Orioles 6-2, with Casey Schmitt leading the Giants' offense. Cade Povich earned the win for the Orioles, pitching 6.2 innings with 5 strikeouts and 1 earned run.

Injuries and availability continue to impact teams, with several players being placed on the injured list. Parker Meadows has been transferred from the 10-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to a left radius fracture. Jonathan Bowlan has been placed on the 15-day injured list with a right groin strain, while Ken Waldichuk and Cole Henry have been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left forearm tightness and right rotator cuff strain, respectively.

The Chicago White Sox made a trade, acquiring outfielder Jordan Rich from the Toronto Blue Jays in exchange for second baseman Lenyn Sosa. The Philadelphia Phillies also made a trade, acquiring right fielder Steward Berroa from the Milwaukee Brewers for cash.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall to Orioles in 6-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles took down the San Francisco Giants 6-2, with Casey Schmitt leading the Giants' offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 1 RBI. Cade Povich earned the win for the Orioles, pitching 6.2 innings with 5 strikeouts and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Edge Phillies in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a 4-3 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies, ending the game on a strong note. Trea Turner led the Diamondbacks' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance, while Andrew Painter pitched 5 strong innings for the Phillies.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays 8-2**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured an 8-2 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Taj Bradley earning the win after pitching 5.0 innings with 7 strikeouts and 1 earned run. Tristan Gray led the Twins' offense with a home run, 3 RBIs, and 1 hit in 3 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Angels Take Down Reds 9-6**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels secured a 9-6 victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with José Soriano earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 10 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Meadows Shifts to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Detroit Tigers center fielder Parker Meadows has been transferred from the 10-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to a left radius fracture.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire OF Jordan Rich in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox made a move on April 13, 2026, trading 2B Lenyn Sosa to the Toronto Blue Jays in exchange for OF Jordan Rich and future considerations.
